label: api.py
doc: API module - exposes the document pipeline over HTTP. Thin layer over parser, va

label: handle_upload()
doc: Accept a list of file paths, run the full pipeline on each,     and return a sum

label: handle_get()
doc: Fetch a document by ID and return it.

label: handle_delete()
doc: Delete a document by ID.

label: handle_list()
doc: List all document IDs in storage.

label: handle_search()
doc: Simple keyword search over the index.     Returns documents whose keyword list o

label: handle_enrich()
doc: Re-enrich a document to pick up new cross-references.

label: parser.py
doc: Parser module - reads raw input documents and converts them into a structured fo

label: parse_file()
doc: Read a file from disk and return a structured document.

label: parse_markdown()
doc: Extract title, sections, and links from markdown.

label: parse_json()
doc: Parse a JSON document into a structured dict.

label: parse_plaintext()
doc: Split plaintext into paragraphs.

label: parse_and_save()
doc: Full pipeline: parse, validate, save. Returns the saved record ID.

label: batch_parse()
doc: Parse a list of files and return their record IDs.

label: processor.py
doc: Processor module - transforms validated documents into enriched records ready fo

label: normalize_text()
doc: Lowercase, strip extra whitespace, remove control characters.

label: extract_keywords()
doc: Pull non-stopword tokens from text, deduplicated.

label: enrich_document()
doc: Add keyword index and cross-references to a validated document.

label: find_cross_references()
doc: Look up the index and return IDs of related documents by keyword overlap.

label: process_and_save()
doc: Enrich a validated document and persist it. Returns the record ID.

label: reprocess_all()
doc: Re-enrich all records in the index. Returns count of records updated.

label: storage.py
doc: Storage module - persists documents to disk and maintains the search index. All

label: load_index()
doc: Load the full document index from disk.

label: save_index()
doc: Persist the index to disk.

label: save_parsed()
doc: Write a parsed document to storage. Returns the assigned record ID.

label: save_processed()
doc: Write an enriched document to storage, updating the index with keywords.

label: load_record()
doc: Fetch a single document by ID.

label: delete_record()
doc: Remove a document and its index entry. Returns True if it existed.

label: list_records()
doc: Return all record IDs currently in storage.

label: validator.py
doc: Validator module - checks that parsed documents meet schema requirements before

label: validate_document()
doc: Run all validation checks on a parsed document. Raises ValidationError on failur

label: check_required_fields()
doc: Raise if any required field is missing.

label: check_format()
doc: Raise if the format is not in the allowed list.

label: normalize_fields()
doc: Clean up text fields using the processor.

label: validate_batch()
doc: Validate a list of documents. Returns (valid_docs, errors).
